description_long: This is a rustic wooden fence constructed from three horizontal planks attached to two sturdy vertical posts. The posts are capped with pointed pyramid-shaped tops, giving the fence a traditional countryside appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, with a medium brown coloration and subtle texture variations. Metal bolts or rivets are used to secure the rails to the posts, adding a functional detail. The fence is solid and opaque, with no decorative cutouts or embellishments. Its design is simple and robust, suitable for marking boundaries or enclosing small areas in urban parks, gardens, or along sidewalks.
description: A sturdy, brown wooden fence with three horizontal rails and pointed post caps, secured by metal bolts. The design is simple and functional, with visible wood grain and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three horizontal rails, both posts with pointed caps, and visible metal bolts securing the rails.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the posts and rails, with the pointed caps visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the three horizontal rails and posts, with less detail on the bolts and wood grain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thickness of the structure and the pointed post caps.
